profile.name: Tobi Joshua Samuel
profile.title: Senior Software Engineer · Data Scientist
profile.tagline: Full-stack systems, ML pipelines, and production delivery with CI/CD.
profile.summary: I design and ship production software — APIs, ML systems, and cloud-native apps — with strong emphasis on automated pipelines, observability, and clean architecture.
about: I'm a data scientist and software engineer with 4+ years designing, building, and deploying machine learning models and full-stack web applications. My core stack is Python, Django, React, and PostgreSQL, with a focus on systems that are reliable in production.

I founded Expert Hive Tutors, an EdTech platform that connects students with verified tutors for academic support — spanning a React web app, Django REST API, and React Native mobile product used in Nigeria.

My work includes predictive analytics, deep learning pipelines, enterprise APIs, and client-facing platforms. I collaborate with cross-functional teams, mentor junior developers, and care about turning complex data problems into clear, maintainable software.

I'm especially interested in data-driven products, fintech, and scalable web systems. When I'm not shipping, I explore new AI tooling, contribute to open source, and share what I learn with the developer community.

research.intro: Selected papers and proposals on computer vision, medical imaging, security systems, and control engineering.

publications.title: Biohub Cell Lineage Tracker: An Open Pipeline and Interactive System for 3D Cell Tracking During Development
Development of a Lightweight AI-Assisted Triage Pipeline for Chest Imaging (X-ray / CT)
Real-time Intrusion Detection System on Windows: Implementation of a Network-Based Security Information System
Stability and Control Analysis of Douglas DC-8
Medical Image Filtering (Lung-CT scan image from an animal lung research study)

cicd.title: Automated delivery
cicd.text: GitHub Actions workflows for test, lint, build, and deploy across frontend and backend repos.

cicd.title: Containerized services
cicd.text: Docker-based environments for reproducible dev and production parity on cloud hosts.

cicd.title: Production hardening
cicd.text: Environment-driven config, OpenAPI docs, JWT rotation, and staged RC releases (e.g. EduFlow RC2).

cicd.title: Multi-target deploy
cicd.text: AWS EC2, Streamlit Cloud, PythonAnywhere, and GitHub Pages — each with tailored pipelines.
